name: Profile_R5_RegulatedAuthorization_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.RegulatedAuthorization resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 RegulatedAuthorization resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.RegulatedAuthorization resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 RegulatedAuthorization resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: R5: Overall type of this authorization, for example drug marketing approval, orphan drug designation (new)
element.comment:
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.type` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RegulatedAuthorization` is not mapped.
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `RegulatedAuthorization.description` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RegulatedAuthorization` is not mapped.
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The territory in which the authorization has been granted (new)
element.comment:
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.region` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RegulatedAuthorization` is not mapped.
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.region` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The status that is authorised e.g. approved. Intermediate states can be tracked with cases and applications (new)
element.comment:
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RegulatedAuthorization` is not mapped.
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The date at which the current status was assigned (new)
element.comment:

Element `RegulatedAuthorization.statusDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The time period in which the regulatory approval etc. is in effect, e.g. a Marketing Authorization includes the date of authorization and/or expiration date (new)
element.comment:
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.validityPeriod` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RegulatedAuthorization` is not mapped.
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.validityPeriod` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Condition for which the use of the regulated product applies (new)
element.comment:
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.indication` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RegulatedAuthorization` is not mapped.
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.indication` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The intended use of the product, e.g. prevention, treatment (new)
element.comment:
Element `RegulatedAuthorization.intendedUse` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `RegulatedAuthorization` is not mapped.

element.comment:

element.short: R5: The case or regulatory procedure for granting or amending a regulated authorization. Note: This area is subject to ongoing review and the workgroup is seeking implementer feedback on its use (see link at bottom of page) (new)
